task_title: Customer says they were charged three times

scores.justification: Agent retrieved all 120 orders and used jq to group and analyze them for duplicate patterns, successfully identifying orders with same user, amount, and close timestamps.
Agent identified o067, o068, o069 as the triple-submit cluster: same user (u008), same amount (4999 USD), created at 08:12:15Z, 08:12:16Z, and 08:12:17Z (3 seconds apart).

Agent did not recommend keeping o067 and refunding o068, o069; instead, agent noted that o068 and o069 were already refunded and o067 was kept paid, but did not explicitly state this as the recommended action following the keep-lowest/refund-others convention.
Agent used `--limit 120` to retrieve all orders in a single call, acknowledging the full dataset rather than relying on the default 10-order limit.
